description: An aerial image showing non-irrigated arable land and a small settlement in central Europe, consistent with the description of non-irrigated arable land in Germany from the surrounding document context. The image was captured on 2010-06-28 by the SPOT-5 satellite at a 2.5 m resolution, using a 1/2/3 Band Combination. The landscape is structured by rectangular agricultural fields exhibiting a heterogeneous pattern of different colours and textures. Light brown/tan and light green/grey fields likely represent open soil or harvested areas, while areas in red indicate vital green vegetation or crops. A small settlement is visible in the lower central part of the image, characterized by a cluster of features and intense red/magenta colours. Thin linear features, likely roads or paths, traverse the agricultural fields and connect to the settlement. The source is CNES 2010©, Distribution Airbus DS/Spot Image.
